Node.help: Description of stat for a stat consumer

PropertyBoolean.name: enabled
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable or disable a statistic. Use this option to hide statistics in views that you do not currently want to see, but do not want to delete. True means that StatViewer will display this statistic. False means that StatViewer will not display this statistic.
PropertyBoolean.help: Enable or disable a statistic. Use this option to hide statistics in views that you do not currently want to see, but do not want to delete.

PropertyString.name: caption
PropertyString.description: Text identifying the statistic in the chart legend.
PropertyString.help: Text identifying the statistic in the chart legend

PropertyString.name: statSourceType
PropertyString.description: The available sources of statistics. Select a Source from the drop-down list.

PropertyString.name: statName
PropertyString.description: The available statistics for the selected Source. Select from the drop-down list.
PropertyString.help: The available statistics for the selected Source

PropertyInt.name: aggregationType
PropertyInt.description: Mathematical operation applied to the source data before displaying the statistic. You can select from the following operations: Sum is the result of adding all values for all time samples together, the total count. Max is the largest value since the beginning of a test. Min is the smallest value since the beginning of a test. Average is the statistical mean, the sum of all values divided by the number of time samples. Rate is the count divided by the time unit, count per second. MaxRate is the largest rate since the beginning of a test. MinRate is the smallest rate since the beginning of a test. AverageRate is the statistical mean rate, the sum of all rates divided by the number of time samples.
PropertyInt.help: Enumeration of the mathematical operation applied to the source data before displaying the statistic

PropertyBoolean.name: enumerated
PropertyBoolean.description: Determines whether the statistic is displayed as a sinlge aggregated value or enumerate all the individual values.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determines whether the statistic is displayed as a sinlge aggregated value or enumerate all the individual values

PropertyBoolean.name: interpolated
PropertyBoolean.description: Whether or not interpolate the stat value

PropertyInt.name: index
PropertyInt.help: First index of array stats range

PropertyInt.name: indexLast
PropertyInt.help: Last index of array stats range

PropertyString.name: csvStatLabel
PropertyString.help: The label of a new stat for a csv log

PropertyString.name: csvFunctionLabel
PropertyString.help: The label of the aggregation function for csv log
